title: The Violent Patriot
writer: Luigi Capranica, Sandro Continenza, Italo De Tuddo
actors: Vittorio Gassman, Constance Smith, Gérard Landry
plot: The legendary John of the Black Bands begins a romantic relationship with a beautiful girl without revealing his identity. The girl unconsciously discovers the truth and retires to a convent. She thinks that John is guilty of the ...
